'''banovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nylghai|nylghai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nylghai|nylghai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| banovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || bæneveth || bænevej || bænevesh || bæneve
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || banonovoth || banonovoj || banonovosh || banonovo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || banovoth || banovoj || banovosh || banovo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || banofvofth || banofvofj || banofvofsh || banofvof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || banovotho || banovojo || banovosho || banovoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || banovoth || banovoj || banovosh || banovo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || banovothol || banovojol || banovoshol || banovokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || banovoothotho || banovoojojo || banovooshosho || banovooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || banovothon || banovojon || banovoshon || banovokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || banovothooro || banovojooro || banovoshooro || banovokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
